author: somnergy
content:
<@944007601400741989> We'll have an ERE integration PR on the repo next week and a release later this week for faster EEST runs in zkEVM for zilkworm. Current model is json artefact conversion to the current (old) input format for zilkworm's consumption.
That format is basically read the MPT nodes and plain keys and make Plain key state map and keccak(MPT Node) -> MPT Node map serialized and pass it on.
This will be deprecated in the next iteration in favour of a yet another version of pre-indexing

author: developeruche
content:
Awesome… looking forward! 

Would the guest programs input format for this release be the flat-object format you are exploring?

author: somnergy
content: Not for this one yet, no. But in the next release.
